compiler.title: Report Compiler
compiler.subtitle: Configure the handout then save as PDF via system print.
compiler.printTip: Tip: In the print dialog, uncheck <1>Headers and footers</1> to hide the browser date, title, and URL from the output.

defaults.title: Summer Retreat 2026 — Official Room Allocations
defaults.footerNotes: Please check in at the reception desk to pick up your key. Absolute quiet hours are from 10:00 PM to 7:00 AM.
